channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Sam Neill passes away at 78 after battling cancer, surrounded by loved ones
item.description: Renowned actor Sam Neill, best known for his iconic role as Ian Malcolm in the Jurassic Park franchise, has passed away at the age of 78. The news was confirmed by his family and close friends, who re...

item.title: Jalen Ngonda discusses Arctic Monkeys' influence on his music
item.description: Jalen Ngonda, a 32-year-old soul singer, has shared his admiration for Arctic Monkeys, particularly their 2013 album 'AM', which significantly influenced his songwriting. Speaking to NME backstage at ...

item.title: Brandon River Levels Stabilize After Flooding, Mayor Reports
item.description: Winnipeg River levels in Brandon have reached their peak and stabilized, according to the city’s mayor. The update comes as communities grapple with the aftermath of recent flooding, which has caused ...

item.title: Fourth Day of Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial: NBI Finds No Valid Evidence Against Alleged Hitman
item.description: The fourth day of Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial focused on the prosecution's case against her, with National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) regional director Jeremy Lotoc testifying a...

item.title: Humanitarian Aid Breakthrough: 26 Containers Allow Entry into Afghanistan via Torkham Border
item.description: Pakistani customs authorities have issued gate passes for 26 World Food Programme (WFP) containers carrying food and essential supplies to cross into Afghanistan via the Torkham border, despite the cl...

item.title: Jovial Shares Struggles and Challenges in Music Career
item.description: Kenyan singer Jovial has opened up about her tough early years in the music industry, revealing she once slept on the floor to survive. During an interview with Alex Mwakideu, she shared how she faced...

item.title: Nigerian Army Lieutenant Felix Ademe Isaac Laid to Rest with Full Honours After Dying in Oyo Rescue Operation
item.description: The Nigerian Army has given full military honours to Lieutenant Felix Ademe Isaac, the 28-year-old officer wey lose him life during the rescue operation for abducted pupils and teachers for Oyo State....

item.title: Judge Orders Restriction on Todd Blanche's Testimony Ahead of Senate Confirmation Hearing
item.description: U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche faces significant legal challenges as a federal judge has issued an order prohibiting him from defending a controversial IRS settlement during his upcoming Senate co...

item.title: Senegal's Constitutional Court Blocks Controversial Reform
item.description: Senegal’s Constitutional Court has rejected a controversial constitutional amendment proposed by the ruling Pastef party, deeming it unconstitutional. The reform aimed to restrict sitting presidents f...

item.title: US reinstates Hormuz naval blockade amid Iran tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced the reinstatement of a naval blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, citing security concerns. The move comes as tensions escalate between Washington and Tehran, with...

item.title: Hughie Vaughan's aerial surfing dominance and future in the ocean
item.description: Hughie Vaughan, a young Australian surfer, has become a sensation in the surfing world with his groundbreaking aerial maneuvers. His one-handed backflip, dubbed the 'stalefish flipper,' broke the inte...

item.title: University of Nairobi Opens Transfer Portal for KUCCPS Students
item.description: The University of Nairobi has launched an inter-institution transfer portal for students placed by the Kenya Universities and Colleges Central Placement Service (KUCCPS) during the 2026/2027 academic ...

item.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford Announces Potential Policy Changes Following Welfare Eligibility Ruling for Long-Term Illegal Resident
item.description: Ontario Premier Doug Ford has stated he will consider changing provincial regulations after a tribunal ruled that a man living illegally in Canada for decades is eligible for Ontario welfare benefits....

item.title: activists unveil banner linking ex-prince andrew to jeffrey epstein at buckingham palace
item.description: a group of anti-monarchy activists has unfurled a provocative banner depicting convicted pedophile jeffrey epstein and former duke of york andrew mountbatten-windsor at buckingham palace, symbolizing ...

item.title: Former ANC Mayor Joins MK Party in KwaZulu-Natal
item.description: Zandile Gumede, the former mayor of Ethekwini, has officially joined the Umkhonto weSizwe Party (MKP) and been appointed as deputy provincial convenor in KwaZulu-Natal. The announcement was made durin...

item.title: Bank of Tanzania Finalizes Crypto Regulations to Balance Innovation and Investor Protection
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BoT) is finalizing comprehensive regulations for cryptocurrencies and virtual assets, aiming to balance financial innovation with investor protection. Governor Emmanuel Tutuba an...

item.title: NBI Finds No Evidence of Hitman Linked to Sara Duterte in Impeachment Case
item.description: The article discusses the latest developments in the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Regional Director Jeremy Lotoc stated that his team fo...

item.title: Four young drivers faced fines and licence suspensions after speeding incidents in Canberra
item.description: Four young drivers aged 17-23 have been fined and had their licences suspended after being caught speeding in Canberra during a police operation. The incidents occurred between July 9-11, 2026, with o...

item.title: Armed police arrest suspect in Ann Widdecombe's death investigation as counter-terrorism probe continues
item.description: The death of former MP Ann Widdecombe has sparked a major counter-terrorism investigation following the arrest of a suspect by armed police. New CCTV footage has emerged showing the individual being d...

item.title: Lahore court grants four-day remand extension for foreign women's assault suspects
item.description: A Lahore court has extended the physical remand of four suspects in a high-profile case involving the alleged kidnapping and rape of two foreign women. The suspects, including prime suspect Ahmad Raza...
